---
title: "Thomas Chamberlayne"
---

## Thomas Chamberlayne

**Dates:** (12 Apr 1805-21 Oct 1876)

### Description

neighbour of CMY

### Biography

Squire of the village of Otterbourne, he lived at Cranbury Park in the village, but CMY makes comparatively few references to him, and they are quite temperate. He married (6 Sept 1830) Amelia Onslow (c. 1807-1898) [LG 1871, 1906 Chamberlayne]

### Letters

- [To Anna Meredith Barrett Lennard, Decr 21st 1898](../letters/3389_To_Anna_Meredith_Barrett_Lennard.html)
- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]
- Letter from July 27th 1876
- Letter from Feb 15th 1869
- Letter from Sept 4th 1867
- Letter from March 12th 1863
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from August 6, 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
